# Title: Troubleshooting Guide

Title: Troubleshooting Guide

URL Source: https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GL8JZEN7SRVFFDAA

Markdown Content:
## Virtual Identity Verification: Troubleshooting Guide

This guide provides solutions for common issues you may encounter during your virtual identity verification process.

## Before Starting the Video Call

Ensure you're using a compatible browser:

*   Windows users: Google Chrome (recommended), Firefox
*   iOS/Apple users: Safari
*   Android users: Google Chrome

## Common Issues and Solutions

**Audio Problems**

If you can't hear or be heard:

*   Check if your microphone is muted
*   Increase your device volume
*   Allow microphone access in your browser
*   Try using headphones
*   Ensure headphones are selected as the "playback device" in your settings
*   Close other apps using audio

**Video Problems**

If your camera isn't working:

**Video Problems**

If your camera isn't working:

*   Check if other apps are using your camera
*   Allow camera access in your browser
*   Refresh your browser page
*   Try closing and reopening your browser

**Camera/Microphone Permission Issues**

For Chrome users:

1.   Click the camera icon in the address bar
2.   Select "Allow" for both camera and microphone.
3.   Refresh the page

For Safari users:

1.   Click "Allow" when prompted for camera/microphone access
2.   Check Settings > Safari > Camera/Microphone permissions

**Connection Issues**

If you see "Something went wrong":

*   Refresh the page
*   Check your internet connection
*   Switch between WiFi and mobile data
*   Disable VPN if using one

**Screen/Image Problems**

If the screen is frozen or showing errors:

*   Refresh the browser
*   Clear browser cache
*   Try a different browser
*   Restart your device

**Document Upload Issues**

If unable to upload documents:

**Document Upload Issues**

If unable to upload documents:

*   Ensure file format is supported (DOCX, JPEG, JPG, PDF, PNG only)
*   Check file size (must be less than 4MB per file)
*   Try uploading one file at a time
*   Refresh the page if stuck

**Quick Tips**

*   Always use a stable internet connection (minimum 1.5 Mbps required)
*   Test audio and video devices before the scheduled call time
*   Close unnecessary browser tabs and applications
*   Keep your browser updated to the latest version
*   Have a backup device ready if possible
*   Join the call from a quiet location with good lighting

**Common Error Messages and Solutions**

"There is an issue with audio/video device":

*   Close other applications using camera/microphone
*   Refresh the page
*   Check device permissions

"Something went wrong":

*   Refresh the page
*   Try a different browser
*   Check internet connection
*   Disable VPN if using one
